statement: Focus Island as selection/filtering engine — Focus Island is a strategic selection/filtering engine, not a simple filter. It lets users find and concentrate on specific work across the whole plan while preserving hierarchy. — Supports focus modes by Week, Action, Task, and Task property/spec (sender, receiver, channel, task type, subtask, future structured fields). On selecting a focus option, the system finds all matching tasks, selects them, highlights with animation, expands any collapsed phase/action containing them, and preserves hierarchy context. Works in both Kanban and Timeline.
